overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk city alley and shantytown at night. The player character walks past neon-lit buildings, descends stairs revealing a sprawling neon cityscape, and navigates through the Kabuki Shantytown area with towering holographic advertisements in the background. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley past neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in red pants leaning against the wall near metal shelving

entered.detail: building facade with large PHARMACEUTICALS neon signage in teal
bright teal neon sign spelling PHARMACEUTICALS above the entrance
large green dumpster with debris scattered around
blue plastic barrel next to the dumpster
illuminated vending machine against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow urban alley at night, dominated by a pharmaceuticals building with bright teal neon signage. The player walks forward past a green dumpster and blue barrel on the left, while a person in red pants stands leaning against the wall on the right. The environment is enclosed with concrete sidewalks and artificial lighting.

events.description: descending stairs reveals the open city skyline and shantytown below

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs while the sprawling neon cityscape comes into view

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading downward between walls
distant skyline filled with towering neon billboards and holographic advertisements
pink neon HOTEL sign on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete stairwell, transitioning from the enclosed alley to an open overlook. As the camera moves down, the massive neon-lit city skyline reveals itself in the distance, with a pink HOTEL sign visible on the left. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed as the sky becomes partially visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with hotel and vending

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated concrete pathway past neon signs and vending machines

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with BURRITO signage in red and green neon
white concrete benches lined along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player moves along an elevated concrete walkway lined with benches on the right. A bright burrito vending machine stands on the left near the pink HOTEL sign. The neon city skyline remains visible ahead as the player progresses forward through this semi-covered urban corridor.

events.description: text 'KABUKI SHANTYTOWN' appears on screen identifying the location

agents.ego_description: navigating the wooden platforms of the shantytown, observing the neon cityscape and residents

notable_agents.action: person standing near a makeshift shelter in the shantytown
person sitting on the wooden platform near a fire

entered.detail: makeshift wooden walkways and platforms of the shantytown
rusted corrugated metal sheets forming shantytown structures
improvised shelters and buildings constructed from scrap materials

segments.scene_description: The player enters the Kabuki Shantytown, navigating wooden platforms and passing residents standing or sitting near makeshift shelters. The ground transitions from concrete to wooden decking, and corrugated metal walls line the path. Massive neon holographic billboards tower in the background as the location text appears on screen.

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow corridor of the shantytown toward the distant structures

notable_agents.action: figure standing near a doorway in the shadows

entered.detail: tight walkway with metal grating floor and corrugated walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow metal corridor with grating floors, enclosed by corrugated metal walls. The player approaches the end of the walkway with the neon city skyline visible ahead. A lone figure stands in a doorway on the right as the shantytown structures give way to the open view of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into the sprawling, neon-drenched expanse of a cyberpunk shantytown. It begins by moving past teal neon signage and industrial debris in a narrow concrete corridor before descending a stairwell that opens the view to a massive, glowing city skyline. As the camera progresses along an elevated walkway past a bright burrito vending machine and a pink hotel sign, the environment shifts from sterile concrete to the weathered wooden platforms and corrugated metal of the Kabuki Shantytown. The path then winds through makeshift shelters and past local residents, with towering holographic billboards dominating the background. Finally, the movement leads through a narrow metal grating corridor, passing a lone figure in a doorway as the shantytown structures recede to reveal the open, shimmering vista of Night City.
